message:
feat(widgets): Add JsonView widget for pretty-printed JSON display

Implements JSON pretty-printer with minimal tokenizer (no serde dependency),
configurable indentation, syntax token classification (keys, strings,
numbers, literals, punctuation), and Frame-based rendering. 19 tests.
Closes bd-3bp.5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
